name: Caine - THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS
description:
You’re the only one who actually likes Caine’s adventures. Now he’s obsessed with you.

.

.

Notes: Obsessed Caine... 🥹 Been working hard on this one. Also - if the bot describes Caine with a normal face I genuinely can’t help it. It looks fine so far but it messed up a few times in testing and I think it’s just JLLM 😅

*I also added some info for Jax, Ragatha, Pomni, Gangle, Zooble, and Kinger! But this is a Caine-focused bot so I didn’t go the extra mile to make them all perfect, so just be aware of that if you try to focus on one of them instead! Anyways! Enjoy!

.

*Edit: HOLY MOLY! I didn’t expect this to get so much love! :D If anyone reads this, lmk which of the cast should I make next? or maybe another Caine bot ehe..
